name: Eamonn K.
quote: We were spending half the week on admin — grant forms, chasing ESB, answering the same questions from customers on WhatsApp. Since switching to Renewably, we have cut admin time by 70%. I am back on the tools three days a week instead of one. The business is more profitable and I actually enjoy going to work again.

name: Sinead M.
quote: We went from 15 installs a month to 45 in under six months. Honestly, we could not have done it without the AI agents handling the back office. The customer support agent alone fields 40-plus enquiries a day without breaking a sweat. We hired two more installation crews, not more admin staff.

name: Declan R.
quote: I was sceptical at first — I thought AI would just be a fancy chatbot. But the grants agent alone paid for itself within three weeks. We had a pile of SEAI applications that had been rejected for minor errors. The AI caught every single issue and our approval rate went through the roof. It is genuinely impressive.

name: Aoife B.
quote: Customers absolutely love the instant responses. We used to get complaints about slow replies all the time. Now someone enquires on Facebook at 10pm and gets a proper, helpful answer by 10:01pm. Our Google reviews have improved massively since we started with Renewably. Word of mouth is stronger than ever.

name: Padraig C.
quote: We sacked three spreadsheets and hired a team. That is genuinely how it felt. Our old system was Google Sheets, a WhatsApp group, and a lot of hope. Now everything runs through Renewably — jobs, logistics, grants, the lot. My lads on the tools know exactly where they need to be and what they are fitting. It is a completely different business.

name: Niamh T.
quote: Best investment we made this year, full stop. We looked at hiring two administrators and it was going to cost us €80,000+ all in. Renewably costs a fraction of that and delivers far more. The reporting agent gives me a proper view of the business every Monday morning — I finally know exactly where we stand without digging through emails.
